channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Airport employee injured in collision with aircraft wing at Chicago's O'Hare
item.description: The driver of a tug vehicle at Chicago O'Hare International Airport was injured Saturday evening after colliding with the wing of an airplane.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, KREX 5

item.title: China to file lawsuit with WTO, vows 'countermeasures' in response to Trump tariffs
item.description: In a statement, the ministry’s spokesperson vowed further “countermeasures” against the United States but did not specify what steps it would take.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KREX 5

item.title: Grammy Awards: How to watch the ceremony, red carpet arrivals, interviews
item.description: The 67th annual Grammy Awards are set to recognize some of the most talented performers and biggest hits in pop music on Sunday, with different ways to watch the festivities.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump puts tariffs on Canada, Mexico and China, spurring trade war as North American allies respond
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Saturday signed an order to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Mexico, Canada and China, drawing swift retaliation and an undeniable sense of betrayal from the country's North American neighbors as a trade war erupted among the longtime allies.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ZEKE MILLER, ROB GILLIES and CHRISTOPHER SHERMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Long-lost van Gogh painting was sold at Minnesota garage sale for $50, according to report
item.description: Experts believe a long-lost Vincent van Gogh painting, "Elimar," was found at a Minnesota garage sale in 2016, where it was sold for $50.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump follows through on long-standing pledge, signs tariffs on Canada, Mexico and China
item.description: "Tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China are SIGNED!" White House spokesperson Harrison Fields posted on the social media platform X.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: CBS agrees to hand over '60 Minutes' Harris interview transcripts to FCC
item.description: CBS says it will turn over an unedited transcript of its October interview with Kamala Harris to the Federal Communications Commission, part of President Donald Trump's ongoing fight with the network over how it handled a story about his opponent.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says he ordered precision military strike against senior ISIS planner
item.description: President Trump said he ordered precision air strikes on Saturday morning targeting a "senior ISIS Attack planner" and others the unnamed individual recruited and led in Somalia.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Deadly Eaton and Palisades fires 100% contained after 24 days
item.description: The deadly, wind-fueled Palisades and Eaton fires, which broke out 3½ weeks ago in Southern California, were declared fully contained Friday by the California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: DC plane crash: ATC staffing levels under scrutiny as barges arrive to help salvage ops
item.description: Barges are expected to arrive in the D.C area on Saturday to help with salvage operations from Wednesday's deadly plane crash at Regan National Airport as investigator's probe the cause of a collision that left 67 people dead.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Beneath the surface, Groundhog Day's deep roots predate Punxsutawney Phil
item.description: Groundhog Day predictions about the coming of spring put the spotlight on Punxsutawney Phil every Feb. 2, but celebrating the midpoint between the shortest and darkest day of the year and the spring equinox has ancient roots in European agricultural life.
item.dc:creator: MARK SCOLFORO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A medical plane carrying a child patient and 5 others crashes in Philadelphia, setting homes ablaze
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A medical transport jet with a child patient, her mother and four others aboard crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood shortly after takeoff Friday evening, exploding in a fireball that engulfed several homes.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MATT ROURKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: South Carolina puts inmate Marion Bowman Jr. to death in state’s third execution since September
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina put a third inmate to death in four months Friday as it goes through a backlog of prisoners who exhausted their appeals while the state couldn’t find lethal injection drugs. Marion Bowman Jr. was executed at 6:27 p.m.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: VIDEO: 525-pound bear found hiding under evacuated home after Southern California fire
item.description: Wildlife officials rescued a 525-pound bear found hiding underneath a home that was evacuated during the Eaton Fire.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Numerous goods could get more expensive due to Trump tariffs, experts say
item.description: The 25% tax that President Donald Trump plans to slap on imports from Canada and Mexico as soon as Saturday could drive up the price of everything from gasoline and pickup trucks, to Super Bowl party guacamole dip.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WISEMAN AP Economics Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: PETA issues swap deal: Punxsutawney Phil for a vegan cake
item.description: PETA is urging Punxsutawney Groundhog Club to remove Punxsutawney Phil from his Groundhog Day duties.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Congress authorized more flights at Reagan National despite warnings
item.description: Congress added more flights to Reagan National's schedule last year despite warnings from the airport.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Flight recorders recovered in DCA crash
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) said Thursday that they recovered flight data recorders, known as black boxes, from the aircraft involved in the deadly mid-air collision near Reagan Washington National Airport earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, KRON4

item.title: Trump makes his first moves on education, but no McMahon hearing in sight
item.description: President Trump made his first major moves on education Wednesday, signing a series of executive orders that come even before his nominee to lead the Education Department, Linda McMahon, has had her Senate confirmation hearing.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: DC plane crash: Recovery continues, NTSB says investigation ongoing
item.description: Air crash investigations can take months, and federal investigators told reporters they would not speculate on the cause.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump warns Canada, Mexico tariffs are coming on Saturday
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday said he plans to follow through on Saturday on his threat to impose 25 percent tariffs on goods from Mexico and Canada.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Trump aid freeze disrupts global HIV/AIDS fight
item.description: A legacy bipartisan initiative to combat HIV and AIDS in Africa is collateral damage from President Donald Trump’s directive to halt all U.S. foreign assistance, despite efforts to exempt humanitarian assistance and lifesaving medication from being caught up in the three-month funding freeze.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, KRON4

item.title: Midair collision kills 67 people in the deadliest US air disaster in almost a quarter century
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — A midair collision between an Army helicopter and a jetliner killed all 67 people aboard the two aircraft, officials said Thursday, as they scrutinized the actions of the military pilot in the country's deadliest aviation disaster in almost a quarter century.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, TARA COPP, ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and LEA SKENE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Carmel woman among those killed in D.C. passenger jet, helicopter crash
item.description: (WXIN/WTTV): An Indiana University Alumna was among the 67 people killed when a plane and a military helicopter collided near the Ronald Reagan National Airport in Washington, D.C. Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Tyler Haughn, NewsNation

item.title: Marianne Faithfull, singer, actress and Rolling Stones muse, dies at 78
item.description: The 1960s icon passed in London surrounded by family, according to a statement from her record promotion group.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: MMA fighter praises Hitler, calls him a 'good guy' in podcast
item.description: UFC fighter Bryce Mitchell praised Adolf Hitler and denied the Holocaust happened in the first episode of his new podcast.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: Big Oil wants a lot from Trump. It has an ally in Doug Burgum, the president's Interior pick
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — When North Dakota's petroleum association was going to hold a banquet honoring top fracking executives last year, it turned to Gov. Doug Burgum.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN SLODYSKO and JACK DURA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: White House aide says spending freeze isn't being rescinded despite memo
item.description: The White House is claiming the Wednesday move by the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) rescinding a controversial order that froze a wide swath of federal financial assistance is not actually an end to curbing government spending. “This is NOT a rescission of the federal funding freeze.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Video captures fiery crash between American Airlines flight and Army Blackhawk
item.description: Editor's note: The video may appear graphic to some viewers. (NEXSTAR) - Images from the EarthCam video service captured images of what appears to be the fiery crash of an American Airlines jet over the Potomac River Wednesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, Fox 5

item.title: Are we all aliens? NASA's returned asteroid samples hold the ingredients of life from a watery world
item.description: Asteroid samples fetched by NASA hold not only the pristine building blocks for life but also the salty remains of an ancient water world..
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump White House rescinds memo freezing federal money after widespread confusion
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump's budget office on Wednesday rescinded a memo freezing spending on federal loans and grants, less than two days after it sparked widespread confusion and legal challenges across the country.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, ZEKE MILLER and LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hawaii wildfire victims spared from testifying after last-minute deal over $4B settlement
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — Lawyers representing victims of a deadly Hawaii wildfire reached a last-minute deal averting a trial that was scheduled to begin Wednesday over how to split a $4 billion settlement.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER SINCO KELLEHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 2 dogs get new homes after surviving plane crash that killed rescue flight pilot
item.description: Two dogs that survived an animal-rescue flight crash that killed the pilot have found new homes as the late aviator's friends work to honor him by helping more pets, a shelter director said Wednesday. The Nov.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fed holds rates steady as Trump tariffs loom, economy hums
item.description: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady on Wednesday after price increases ticked up over the last three months, suggesting inflation may still have some life in it.
item.dc:creator: Tobias Burns, Fox 5

item.title: Democrats demand Patel information in special counsel's classified documents report
item.description: Democrats on the Senate Judiciary Committee are demanding to see the volume of former special counsel Jack Smith’s report dealing with the Mar-a-Lago classified documents investigation, asserting it has relevant information about Kash Patel, President Trump’s pick to lead the FBI.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: White House budget office rescinds federal funding freeze memo
item.description: The Trump administration’s Office of Management and Budget released a new memo Wednesday rescinding a controversial memo issued late Monday that froze a wide swath of federal financial assistance, which had paralyzed many federal programs and caused a huge uproar on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, ABC 4

item.title: Capitol Police arrest man with Molotov cocktails attempting to target Johnson, Hegseth, Bessent
item.description: The U.S. Capitol Police arrested a man with Molotov cocktails and knives who was allegedly attempting to kill House Speaker Mike Johnson and President Trump’s two recently confirmed nominees, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9
